title: Web Development: congresses, complexes, and cultural portals
description: Freelance projects include the Pain Congress Canarias 2005, the Serenity Amadores complex, Flash integrations for Miquel Rius, and the official website of Agatha Ruiz de la Prada.
body:
Between 2002 and 2005, as a freelancer, I worked on a wide variety of projects that reflected the diversity of the digital landscape at the time: from international medical events to cultural portals and leading corporate websites.

## Featured Projects

-   **Pain Congress Canarias 2005** — Official website for the international congress on pain, with registration management and scientific program.
-   **Serenity Amadores** — Digital presence for the residential and tourist complex in Gran Canaria.
-   **[miquelrius.com](https://www.miquelrius.com/)** — Flash programming and integration for the Miquel Rius brand of notebooks and writing products.
-   **[agatharuizdelaprada.com](https://www.agatharuizdelaprada.com/)** — Official website for fashion designer Agatha Ruiz de la Prada.

## Project Management and Mental Health Portal

As **Project Manager** for the [esquizo.com](https://www.esquizo.com/) portal, I managed the complete design, development, and maintenance of one of the first portals in Catalan and Spanish dedicated to mental health, with an outreach and support focus for patients and their families.

## Corporate Identity and Training

In addition to web projects, I worked on corporate identity and digital presence for companies like Digital Events and Les Cols, and I designed materials for early-stage eLearning workshops.

## Technologies

-   Flash
-   Director
-   ActionScript
-   Lingo
-   Photoshop
-   Fireworks
-   FreeHand
-   Dreamweaver
-   HTML
-   CSS
